raw_consumer_statement: I first filed a fraud report with Barclays XXXX XXXX XXXX in XX/XX/XXXX when someone purchased an XXXX stubs subscription on my card for {$90.00}. They told me the charge would be removed and that I was good to go. However, on XX/XX/XXXX I received an email saying my payments were late and I was getting charged fees on top of the {$90.00} payment that I never made. I have since been on the phone with the XXXX XXXX XXXX department 7 times for no less than XXXX minutes each call with no resolution. They continue to lie to me about the status and what they can do for me. When I asked if I made a payment, would it be refunded to my debit card upon completion of the second round of fraud investigations, XXXX XXXX employee # XXXX ) told me that they could do it instead of credit in the account, I quickly found out that that was a lie. I am at XXXX XXXX where the {$90.00} fraudulent charge is now going to cost me {$120.00} and am being told it will be at least another XXXX months and countless more late charges and hits to my credit for them to reach a conclusion. I am now just paying for it as my time is worth more than calling them again but they are stealing from me and I needed to report it.
